title: Suspicious Service / Scheduled-Task Persistence
description: Detects suspicious Windows service (4697) or scheduled task (4698) creation pointing to LOLBINs or temp/appdata paths.
author: SOC Team
aql: SELECT LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) AS host, username AS performed_by, DATEFORMAT(starttime, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') AS event_time, UTF8(payload) AS raw_event FROM events WHERE UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%AgentLogFile=Security%' AND ( UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%EventID=4697%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%EventID=4698%' ) AND ( UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%powershell%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%cmd.exe%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%mshta%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%rundll32%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%regsvr32%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%certutil%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%\\temp\\%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%\\appdata\\%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%\\users\\public%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%-enc%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%frombase64%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%.bat%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%.vbs%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%.ps1%' ) ORDER BY starttime DESC LAST 15 MINUTES
